name: LEGO Style
description: A photorealistic style inspired by LEGO aesthetics, where characters, foreground and background are made from lego bricks and minifigures.

art_style.line_styles: N/A.  No outlines; instead, shapes are defined by the edges of LEGO bricks and minifigures.
art_style.inking_tools: N/A. No traditional inking; colors are defined by the LEGO bricks
art_style.color_palette: Solid colors that reflect the LEGO palette, including primary colors (red, blue, yellow) and secondary colors (green, orange, purple).  Browns, greys, pastels and transparent colors too.
art_style.spot_colors: Occasional metallic or neon colors for special effects or highlights.
art_style.registration: N/A. No traditional registration; colors are defined by the LEGO bricks.
art_style.lettering_style: Bold, sans-serif font that is easy to read, with a playful touch, mimicking the blocky nature of LEGO text.

character_style.head_to_body_ratio: Human sized characters are minifigures.  Taller characters are made from LEGO bricks.
character_style.limb_proportions: Short and stubby limbs that reflect the blocky aesthetic of LEGO figures.
character_style.anatomy_detail: Minimal anatomical detail, focusing on simplified shapes and flat surfaces rather than realism.
character_style.eye_style: Large circular eyes or simple dots, expressing emotion through exaggerated shapes.
character_style.nose_style: Simple line or dot for a nose, keeping the face clean and uncomplicated.
character_style.mouth_style: Simple curve or blocky shape with minimal detail, allowing for expressive but easy-to-draw mouths.
character_style.expression_exaggeration: Moderate exaggeration of facial expressions to convey emotions clearly and accessibly.
character_style.silhouette_clarity: Very high clarity to ensure characters stand out against backgrounds easily.
character_style.silhouette_shape_language: Predominantly blocky and angular shapes, reinforcing the LEGO theme.
character_style.detail_complexity: Low complexity with flat surfaces and minimal textures, focusing on color over intricate details.
character_style.texture_accents: Subtle textures to mimic plastic surfaces, such as slight gloss or shading.
character_style.motion_line_style: Stylized speed lines or blocks to indicate action, keeping the motion dynamic but simple.
character_style.expression_line_style: Basic accent lines to indicate emotion, such as sweat drops or blush, very simplified.
character_style.signature_motifs: Iconic shapes like LEGO bricks or connectors occasionally integrated into backgrounds or character designs.
character_style.recurring_flourishes: Small, playful elements, like tiny stars or mini bricks, used as embellishments in panels.

chat.shape: Rounded rectangular with slightly blocky corners.
chat.border: Thick black outline with a solid fill.
chat.fill_color: Light gray to contrast with text.
chat.font: Bold, sans-serif font resembling LEGO lettering.

whisper.shape: Rounded rectangular with tiny dotted edges for a softer look.
whisper.border: Thin dashed line for a gentle feel.
whisper.font: Italicized sans-serif font for a whispering effect.

shout.border: Thick border with a jagged outline.

thought.shape: Cloud-like with a tail pointing to the character.
thought.border: Thin outline to give a light appearance.
thought.fill_color: Soft white with a slight shadow.
thought.font: Light, airy font to suggest thoughtfulness.

sound_effect.shape: Explosive bubble form, irregular and dynamic.
sound_effect.border: Thick outline with shadow for depth.
sound_effect.fill_color: Bright red or orange for impact.
sound_effect.font: Slanted, bold font to convey sound intensity.

narration.fill_color: Cream color for a soft background.
narration.font: Standard sans-serif font for easy reading.
